ORGN_ACQSTN_CHRG_AMT 
LABEL: 
Organ acquisition or other donor bank charge amount ($) 
DESCRIPTION: The charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for organ acquisition or other donor bank services 
related to a beneficiary's stay.
